title: RunRecord
description: The audit record of a single workload execution. References the WorkloadSpec, DataSphere, input/output DataRefs, CapabilityToken, and ProvenanceRecord.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

workload.description: The workload specification that was executed.

sphere.description: The data sphere (execution environment) in which the workload ran.

inputs.description: DataRefs describing the input data entities consumed by this run.

outputs.description: DataRefs describing the output data entities produced by this run.

tokenRef.description: Identifier of the CapabilityToken authorising this run.

decisionRef.description: Optional URN of the PolicyDecision that authorised this run.

status.description: Execution outcome: started, succeeded, failed, or aborted.

time.description: Run timing: startedAt (required) and optional endedAt.

provenanceRef.description: Optional URN of the ProvenanceRecord capturing lineage for this run. Pattern: urn:srcos:prov:<id>

integrity.description: Optional integrity hashes for inputs, outputs, and the run itself, plus an optional signature.
